focus: Reorganize the public site into a project phase home page and focused Phase 1 subsection pages.
reason_started: The operator said the public URL looked crowded with explain and evaluation content on the same page and asked for an intro page listing phases plus separate detail pages.
reason_ended: The organized public routes are deployed, local validation passes, and public verification confirms home, Phase 1 subpages, aliases, planned phase pages, and APIs.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: 20 tests passed, including route organization and focused-page assertions.

validators_executed.name: public route verification
validators_executed.evidence: Live checks passed for home, Phase 1 overview/search/data/explain/evaluation, /phase-1 aliases, planned phase page, and APIs.

validators_skipped.name: browser visual screenshot
validators_skipped.reason: The browser plugin was unavailable in this session; verification used route-level HTML and public HTTP contract checks.

github_submission.blocker: The operator asked to deploy and organize the public pages, not to commit or push.

reusable_lessons: Public research demos need an information architecture before adding multiple evidence artifacts; the root page should orient users and route them to focused pages.
downstream_impacts: Future BEIR, ESCI, and behavioral ranking phases now have planned entry pages and should add their own focused detail pages rather than expanding Phase 1.
content_seeds: Phase 1 article can link directly to /phases/cranfield/search, /data, /explain, and /evaluation depending on the reader's task.
evidence_quality_notes: Route checks include negative assertions that search and explain pages do not carry evaluation-only content.
Public API checks prove the page reorganization did not regress search, explain, or evaluation endpoints.

supports_mission: Keeps the public demo understandable as the project grows past Phase 1.
Preserves transparent search, data, explain, and evaluation evidence without crowding one page.
Creates clear extension points for later phases.
missing: Visual screenshot verification from a browser instance.
Phase 1 article linked to the organized route set.
goal_drift_review.mission_alignment: GEN-008 improves public usability and roadmap clarity without changing the Phase 1 retrieval architecture.
